title: HideTooltip
description: Mod hides item tooltips by default, showing them only when you actually need to see them.
body:
### A lightweight mod that hides item tooltips for a cleaner UI.

# HideToolTip
![--------------------------](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28dd14e40d372ca0070a2d301242fc8771b6c01e_0.webp)

## About
Tired of massive item descriptions blocking your entire inventory view? HideToolTip cleans up your UI by hiding tooltips when you don't need them. Whether you prefer holding a key to peek at stats or toggling the visibility entirely, this mod has you covered.
![--------](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6b7bd51947190b6d9a00a20e027739427d2a5b5_0.webp)

## 🌟 Key Features
- Two Interaction Modes: * Hold to Show: Keep tooltips hidden and only see them while holding **Left Alt**.
- Toggle Mode: **Use V** to switch between "Always Hidden" and "Always Visible" modes instantly.
- Inventory Compatibility: Full support for working inside any inventory or container screen.
- Status Overlay: Get instant feedback with a clean **status message** above your hotbar whenever you switch modes.
- Custom Category: All keybindings are neatly organized in their own "Hide Tooltip" category in the standard Controls menu.
   
##  🛠 Technical Details  
- Client-Side Only: No server-side installation required. Works perfectly on any server or single-player world.
- Optimized for Fabric: Supports Minecraft versions from 1.21.1 up to 1.21.11.
- Optimized for NeoForge: Supports Minecraft versions from 1.21.1 up to 1.21.2.
- Languages: Includes full support for English and Ukrainian.
